```{r}


cloglog_model <- glm(formula = Revenue ~ (.),
family = binomial(link = "cloglog"),
data = train_df_smote)

```

```{r}
vif(cloglog_model)
```

```{r}
train_df_smote <- train_df_smote %>% 
  select(-c(ProductRelated))

cloglog_model <- glm(formula = Revenue ~ .,
family = binomial(link = "cloglog"),
data = train_df_smote)

vif(cloglog_model)

```

```{r}
summary(cloglog_model)

```

```{r}
library(QuantPsyc)
ClassLog(cloglog_model, train_df_smote$Revenue)
```
